title: telemetry-logs — PHP attribute contracts
description: Attributes are discovered at build time by CompileLogContextRegistry. The compiler maps class → { channel, [enrichers], [redacted_fields] }. Runtime is a hash-map lookup + method invocations on the resolving processor.

params.name: key
params.description: Field name in the emitted log record. Semantic convention: `<domain>.<field>` — e.g. `webhook.subscription_id`, `subscription.plan_key`.

params.name: when
params.description: Conditional evaluation. `on_error` = only compute this enricher for warning+ records (avoids overhead on happy path).

params.name: cache_within_request
params.description: Cache the enricher's return value for this request. Prevents evaluating the same method N times for N log lines.

params.name: channel
params.description: Monolog channel name. Records emitted from this class (or subclass, via inheritance) route to this channel by default.

params.name: fields
params.description: When applied to a class, list of property names to redact when this instance appears in a log context. When applied to a property, no params needed — that property is redacted.
